1.11b: Aviva Equity Release UK Limited, PO Box 520, Surrey Street, Norwich, NR1 3WG
1.7: Lending is not permitted when the borrower and mortgagor are not the same person.
1.14: The firm may act if the person dealing with the transaction or an immediate family member is the seller.
1.15: The firm may act if the person dealing with the transaction or an immediate family member is the borrower.
3.1.3: Notification of the seller's legal representative's name and address is not required.
3.1.4: Notification is not required if the seller does not have legal representation.
3.1.5: Contact the lender for acceptable identity verification documents.
3.2.3: Notification of the seller's legal representative's details is not required.
3.2.4: Notification is not required if the seller does not have legal representation.
4.5a: Contact details are the same as 1.11a.
4.5b: Certificates of title should be sent to the address in 1.11a.
4.1: The lender provides the valuation report.
4.3: Incorrect valuation assumptions should be reported to the contact in 1.11a.
5.1.1: Contact the address in 1.11a if the seller has owned the property for less than 6 months.
5.2.1: Contact the address in 1.11a if the seller is not the registered owner.
5.4.4: Environmental or contaminated land reports must be submitted to the lender.
5.4.5: Personal searches are accepted if performed by firms registered under CoPSO.
5.4.6: Contact the lender regarding requirements for search insurance.
5.5.3a: Breaches and unsatisfied conditions must be reported to the contact in 1.11a.
5.5.3b: Original or copy planning permission is not required.
5.5.3c: Building regulation consents are required in specific cases; contact the lender.
5.5.3d: Certificates of lawful use or development are not required.
5.5.4: Restrictions affecting value or marketability must be reported to the contact in 1.11a.
5.7.1a: Lending is permitted on flying/creeping freeholds up to 15% of the total habitable floor area of the building, subject to valuer comments.
5.7.1b: Lending is not permitted on freehold flats.
5.7.1c: Report flying freehold titles to the contact in 1.11a.
5.8.1: Security is accepted for buildings converted into maximum four flats where the borrower occupies one, owns the freehold, and other flats are under long leases.
5.8.5: Security is accepted for one of two leasehold flats where owners cross-own the freehold reversions.
5.9.1: Lending on commonhold is not permitted.
5.10.1: Report restrictions on use to the contact in 1.11a.
5.13.1: Contact 1.11a if the borrower is not providing the full balance or proposes a second charge.
5.14.15a: Report absentee or insolvent landlords to the contact in 1.11a.
5.14.15b: Indemnity insurance is accepted for absent or insolvent landlords.
5.14.1: Minimum unexpired lease term: 160 years minus the age of the youngest borrower.
5.14.9: Lease matters should be referred to the contact in 1.11a.
5.14.10: Service charge matters should be referred to the contact in 1.11a.
5.14.11: Indemnity insurance is not accepted for unsatisfactory lease terms.
5.14.12: Submission of ground rent or service charge receipts is not required.
5.14.13: A receipted copy of notice or evidence of service must be provided.
5.15.2a: Management company issues should be reported to the contact in 1.11a.
5.15.2b: Management company share certificates are not required.
5.15.2c: Signed blank stock transfer forms are not required.
5.15.2d: Management company memorandum and articles of association are not required.
5.16.2: Contact 1.11a if unable to certify search entries.
5.17.5a: A certified copy of the Power of Attorney must be sent.
5.17.5b: General Powers of Attorney are not accepted.
5.19.1: Lending is not permitted on affordable housing, shared equity, or shared ownership.
5.20.1: Leases of roof space for solar PV panels not meeting UK Finance minimum requirements must be reported to 1.11a.
5.20.3: Leases for solar PV panels must comply with UK Finance guidelines and Aviva requirements; refer to 1.11a for guidance.
5.20.4: Existing Green Deal Plans must be disclosed.
Provide the EPC 22-digit reference number or the name and address of the Green Deal provider.
6.1.3: Contact 1.11a if the borrower does not take up the mortgage offer.
6.2.1: Report discrepancies in property description to 1.11a.
6.3.1: Purchase price issues must be reported to 1.11a.
6.4.4: Incentives must be reported to the lender.
6.4.5: Contact 1.11a if the firm lacks control over purchase money payment.
6.5.1: Contact 1.11a if vacant possession will not be given.
6.6.1: Buy-to-let for the whole property is not permitted.
Partial letting of a self-contained unit is allowed if it is under 50% of the total area.
Tenancy must be an Assured Shorthold Tenancy (AST) with a maximum 6-month renewable term and 2-month notice period.
A Tenant’s Deed of Consent and independent legal advice for all occupants is required.
6.6.2: Refer to conditions in 6.6.1 for partial letting; contact 1.11a for details.
6.6.3: Submission of certified copy tenancy agreements is not required.
6.6.4: Lending on Houses in Multiple Occupation (HMO) is not permitted.
6.7.1: Acceptable warranty providers: NHBC, Zurich, Premier, Building Life Plan, Build Zone, LABC, Checkmate/Castle 10, ABC+, Advantage, Ark, Build Assure, Global Home Warranties, Home Proof, ICW, One Guarantee, Protek, The Q Policy.
Retrospective building warranty insurance is not acceptable.
6.7.2: A copy of the warranty document must be sent to the lender.
6.7.3: Assignments of building standards indemnity schemes do not need to be sent.
6.7.4: Properties without a warranty require monitoring by a professional consultant with minimum £1 million PI insurance.
A CML-format Professional Consultant’s Certificate is required; retrospective certificates are not accepted.
6.7.6: The Professional Consultant's Certificate must be sent to the lender.
6.8.1: Report lack of agreement or bond for unadopted roads/sewers to 1.11a.
6.10.2: The lender does not apply retentions.
6.11.1: Report redevelopment or road proposals to 1.11a.
6.12.1: Remortgages: Notification required only if solicitor is advised of pre-emption/options.
Purchases: Pre-emption rights, resale restrictions, and options are generally not accepted; refer deed wording to 1.11a for assessment.
6.13.1: Report undischarged improvement or repair grants to 1.11a.
7.3: Occupier’s Deed of Consent is required only if specified in mortgage offer special conditions.
Occupants must receive independent legal advice.
Married couples and civil partners must be joint owners and borrowers.
7.4: Report doubts regarding information accuracy to 1.11a.
8.1: Solicitors are not permitted to advise specified third parties.
9.1: Indemnity insurance policies must be sent to the lender.
9.2: Indemnity insurance must cover the full value of the property.
10.2b: Minimum notice for advance: 4 working days.
10.3: Application fees are deducted from the mortgage advance.
10.7: Advances must be returned electronically if completion is delayed by more than 2 days.
10.9: Report completion delays to the contact in 1.11a.
10.10: Advance funds may be held for a maximum of 2 days.
10.11: Interest is charged from the date funds are released.
12.3.1: The lender does not use retentions.
14.1.4: Form CH2 application is not required.
14.1.5: The original mortgage deed must be sent to the lender.
A certified copy must be submitted to HMLR.
14.2.1: Title deeds and documents should be sent to the address in 1.11a.

16.3.7a: Transfer of equity execution: Executed as a Deed by Aviva Equity Release UK Limited by its attorney in the presence of 1 attorney and 1 witness.
16.3.7b: Attestation clause: Executed as a Deed by Aviva Equity Release UK Limited acting by its attorney [Name] in the presence of: 1 attorney, 1 witness.
16.3.1: There is no standard form for transfer or deed of covenant.
16.3.4: Transfer of equity documents do not need to be sent to the lender.
16.4.1: Partial letting requests for Edition 5+ terms require a compliant tenancy agreement; contact 1.11a.
16.4.2: Proposed tenancy agreements do not need to be sent.

16.5.3d: Refer option agreement details and deed wording to 1.11a.
16.5.2: Contact 1.11a to confirm if agreements adversely affect security.
17.2.1a: Send discharge and repayment remittance to 1.11a.
